title: Domestic Package Small Integrated Waste Water Treatment Wastewa
summary: An integrated package wastewater treatment plant for properties without mains drainage, treating domestic and small commercial sewage through a combined activated sludge and membrane biochemical process. The compact unit can be installed above ground or underground and discharges treated effluent to a watercourse or ditch.
bullets: No odours and no internal moving parts
Compact for above-ground or underground installation
Fully automatic operation with alarm beacon

specs.label: Tank material
specs.value: Carbon steel with epoxy anticorrosive paint or glassfiber coating
